mapper.select: SELECT b.icon_url bankImg,b.bank_name bankName,a.bank_number bankTail,a.amount amount, a.fee serviceFee,a.create_time createTime,success_time successTime, a.result_info resultInfo,partner_trade_no partnerTradeNo FROM app_wx_cash_out_record as a LEFT JOIN app_wx_bank as b ON a.bank_code = b.bank_code WHERE a.source = 2 AND a.partner_trade_no = #{changeId}
